title: Creating a JSON-LD Context for a Microdata Schema
scenario: Develop a JSON-LD context file for a microdata schema representing a product with multiple variants and reviews. The context should include the schema.org vocabulary and all necessary type definitions, properties, and relationships.
constraints: Must adhere to the JSON-LD and schema.org specifications
Must include the necessary vocabulary and type definitions
Must define all properties and relationships between product variants and reviews

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated context adheres to the JSON-LD and schema.org specifications.
Verifies if the generated context includes the necessary vocabulary and type definitions.
Evaluates if the generated context defines all properties and relationships between product variants and reviews.
